description: A New Accounts Clerk at a financial services company needs to attach a supplementary compliance document to an existing project proposal. Add the file located at /home/ga/nuxeo/data/Q3_Status_Report.pdf as an additional attachment to the 'Project Proposal' document in the Projects workspace (http://localhost:8080/nuxeo). The main file of the document must not be replaced; the Q3 Status Report PDF should be added as a supplementary attachment to the document.
